creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
After anti-spam announce, I tried to contact the postmaster,
but the mail was returned. Please read the message.

Fix: 

I understand that this is the only way of stopping spam, and I can live
without posting while my sysadmin is fired, but please let me subscribe
(or unsubscribe) at will.
How-To-Repeat: The original message was received at Sat, 29 Nov 1997 23:49:24 -0500
from unalmodem13.usc.unal.edu.co [168.176.3.43]

   ----- The following addresses had delivery problems -----
<postmaster@FreeBSD.org>  (unrecoverable error)

   ----- Transcript of session follows -----
... while talking to hub.freebsd.org.:
